ControlledSubstance.description: A concrete portion (lot, package, or charged quantity) of a drug or other substance included in a schedule of a controlled-substances regime (21 U.S.C. § 802(6)). Represents the seized/charged quantity of matter, not the chemical kind: identify the chemical with drug:substance referencing a ChEBI IRI (e.g. obo:CHEBI_6809 methamphetamine). Grounded as gufo:Quantity (amount of matter) via drugs-profile-gufo.ttl — not gufo:FunctionalComplex.

properties.name: substance
properties.description: IRI reference to the chemical entity class in an open chemical ontology, preferably ChEBI (methamphetamine CHEBI_6809, fentanyl CHEBI_119915, cocaine CHEBI_27958, heroin CHEBI_27808) or DrOn for pharmaceutical products.

properties.name: substanceName
properties.description: Substance name verbatim from the source record.

properties.name: csaSchedule
properties.description: Controlled-substance schedule, open vocabulary; recommended 'I'-'V' per 21 U.S.C. § 812.

properties.name: mass
properties.description: Measured or charged mass in the unit given by massUnit; for 'X grams or more' charges record the threshold and keep the verbatim text in quantityDescription.

properties.name: massUnit
properties.description: UCUM unit code for mass, e.g. 'g', 'kg', 'mg'.

properties.name: purityBasis
properties.description: Whether quantities describe the whole mixture or the actual controlled substance: 'mixture' or 'actual' (21 U.S.C. § 841(b); USSG § 2D1.1).

properties.name: quantityDescription
properties.description: Quantity as stated verbatim in the source record, to avoid fabricating precision.
